heading: Notice of address change; amendment of certificate of registration
label: 1815 Notice of address change; amendment of certificate of registration
notes: Effective DateSection effective 90 days from , see , set out as a note under .Jan. 14, 1983section 524 of Pub. L. 97–470section 1801 of this title

children.text: provide to the Secretary within thirty days a notice of each change of permanent place of residence; and

children.label: A
children.text: engage in another farm labor contracting activity,

children.label: B
children.text: use, or cause to be used, another vehicle than that covered by the certificate to transport any migrant or seasonal agricultural worker, or

children.label: C
children.text: use, or cause to be used, another real property or facility to house any migrant agricultural worker than that covered by the certificate.
